title: Z-Caplure Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''''Caplure''''' was a group of three [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] used by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]].

''Caplure'' group were assigned to destroy the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]]. However, they were destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Behind the scenes==
The corvettes were called ''Z-Caplure'' to remind the player that the corvettes were under the command of Zaarin.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
